history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

An anime-style illustration with a dark purple, neon, and magical theme, promoting a product called "Script Elaina." The central figure is a young anime girl with long, flowing white hair and striking purple eyes, dressed as a witch in a black robe with purple accents and a wide-brimmed witch hat adorned with a purple ribbon and gold buckle. She is positioned on the left side of the image, looking towards the viewer with a gentle smile, her right hand near her face.

The background is dark and atmospheric, with subtle hints of a magical cityscape or forest in the distance, illuminated by faint purple and blue lights. Swirling particles and faint star-like glimmers add to the mystical ambiance.

The image is divided into several sections, each with a dark background and neon purple or gold borders.

On the top left, "Script Elaina" is written in a stylized, glowing purple font, with "POWERFULL - MULTIFUNGSI - PREMIUM" below it.

To the right of the main character, there are three prominent boxes:
1.  **SCRIPT ELAINA:** This box has a purple border and contains "Script Elaina" at the top, followed by "Rp70.000" in large, glowing purple numbers. Below the price, it reads "SCRIPT BOT MULTIFUNGSI FITUR LENGKAP & STABIL." A small witch hat icon is at the top of this section.
2.  **FULL BENEFIT:** This box features a gold border and a golden crown icon. The text "FULL BENEFIT" is in a gold banner. The price is "Rp80.000" in large, glowing yellow numbers. Below this, it states "DAPATKAN SEMUA BENEFIT PREMIUM & EKSKLUSIF."
3.  **RESELLER SCRIPT:** This box has a purple border and a gold medal icon with a star and purple ribbons. The text "RESELLER SCRIPT" is in a purple banner. The price is "Rp140.000" in large, glowing purple numbers. Below this, it says "JADI RESELLER & DAPATKAN KEUNTUNGAN LEBIH BESAR."

Further down, there are two more sections:
*   **KEUNGGULAN (Advantages):** This section lists features with purple bullet points and text in white, such as "2080+ fitur lengkap include premium apikey," "Menu stiker, maker, tofigure & tools lengkap," "Sewa & premium bot full otomatis," "7 tampilan menu bisa diganti," "Auto downloader all social media," "Menu store sistem katalog," "Smart auto AI text & voice note," "Script rapi & clean 1 file setting," "Update rutin & maintenance terjaga," "Anti over-limit & anti bad session," and "Online 24/7 nonstop."
*   **FITUR (Features):** This section also has white text and purple icons. Features include "Downloader All sosmed," "Auto Download," "Auto sticker," "Bikin sticker," "Ubah foto menjadi sticker," "Autoai ngobrol 24 jam bersama bot," "Edit foto menjadi keren dan kece," "HD foto dan video," "Menu Rpg Lengkap," "Update simpel dan rutin," "Free request fitur," "Open close group otomatis/manual," "Menu islami dan pengingat sholat," "Bisa open Sewa bot," "Menu store & auto order," and "apk premium." It concludes with "Jpm lengkap dan ada push kontak" and "DAN MASIH BANYAK FITUR KEREN LAINNYA!"

At the very bottom, there are icons and text related to service and updates:
*   **MASUK GRUP UPDATE:** A purple icon with three people silhouettes, with text "Gabung grup eksklusif untuk info update terbaru & fitur baru!"
*   **FREE UPDATE:** A purple circular icon with rotating arrows, with text "Dapatkan semua update terbaru selamanya tanpa biaya tambahan!"
*   **FREE PANEL 30 HARI:** A purple shield icon, with text "Gratis panel premium selama 30 hari untuk semua pembelian!"
*   **SERVICE TERJAMIN • AMAN • STABIL • CEPAT • SUPPORT 24/7:** Text at the bottom in white.

The overall mood is magical, modern, and slightly mysterious, with a strong emphasis on digital services and benefits. The color palette is dominated by dark purples, blacks, neon purples, and accents of gold and white. The lighting is dramatic and emphasizes the glowing text and neon elements.
